directive: All new source files must be TypeScript. Do not add new .js files to the project.
source_quotes: All new source files must be TypeScript. Do not add new .js files to the project.
bin/ launcher and remaining scripts/*.js: CommonJS
When modifying an existing JavaScript file, prefer migrating it to TypeScript in the same PR.

deny: creating new .js source files under project source, script, test, or plugin directories
allow: editing existing legacy JavaScript launchers or helper scripts
